message:

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "nats-1556-client-connections-load-balancing-among-nats-cluster-nodes",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "nats: Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes",
+    "description": "Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current nats deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your nats version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nhelm list -n nats 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working nats installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review nats configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant nats configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nkubectl get configmap -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=nats\n```\nHello! Currently the mechanism of load balancing of client connections to nats cluster is based on random node selection."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes",
+        "description": "- [X] Link to issue, e.g. `Resolves #NNN`\n - [X] Branch rebased on top of current main (`git pull --rebase origin main`)\n\n - [X] You have certified that the contribution is your original work and that you license the work to the project under the [Apache 2 license](https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/blob/main/LICENSE)\n\n### Changes proposed in this pull request:\n\nAdds tw new $SYS server API endpoints:\n\n- `$SYS.REQ.SERVER.%s.KICK` (where %s is the server_id) which 'kicks' (effectiveley\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade nats to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade nats:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade nats nats/nats --namespace nats\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n nats\nhelm list -n nats\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nkubectl get events -n nats --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- [X] Link to issue, e.g. `Resolves #NNN`\n - [X] Branch rebased on top of current main (`git pull --rebase origin main`)\n\n - [X] You have certified that the contribution is your original work and that you license the work to the project under the [Apache 2 license](https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/blob/main/LICENSE)\n\n### Changes proposed in this pull request:\n\nAdds tw new $SYS server API",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "nats",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "nats"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/issues/1556",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/pull/4298"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with nats installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:46:32.689Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
